title: Adaptive PQC Key-Encapsulation for High-Reliability Multipath QUIC Telemetry
venue: SCI 2026 — 8th International Conference on Smart Computing and Informatics
abstract: Designed a quantum-resistant communication framework using NIST Level-3 PQC primitives (lattice-based KEM) and multipath QUIC transport protocol for mission-critical and contested networks. Formulated multipath scheduling as a constrained optimization problem to minimize end-to-end latency and packet loss under adversarial network conditions.

title: LLM-Based Courtroom Simulation for Exploring Indian Civil Law Cases
venue: SCI 2026 — 8th International Conference on Smart Computing and Informatics
abstract: Built a multi-agent LLM platform processing unstructured Indian civil law corpora; applied NLP pipelines for role classification, argument extraction, and procedural simulation — reducing manual legal review time by 75%.

title: GANs in Urban Digital Twins: Systematic Review and Architecture for Policy Simulation
venue: SCI 2026 — 8th International Conference on Smart Computing and Informatics
abstract: Conducted a systematic literature review synthesizing 40+ papers across six urban AI domains; proposed a GAN-based simulation architecture for data-constrained developing cities.
